Now Streaming Everywhere
Presented by Mike Morse

BUILD A
FIRM THAT
CAN'T BURN

Owning a law firm is harder than anyone told you it would be. Mike Morse and Kate Nachazel sit down with attorneys and firm owners to talk about what the job actually looks like — the wins, the bad hires, the pivots, and the moments that almost broke them. Mike built a 290-person firm with $360M in settlements. Every guest has their own version of that story. You'll leave each episode with a newfound purpose and the inspiration to keep going, along with practical lessons you can put in place today.

FIREPROOF PODCAST
Now Accepting Guests
Want to be on the show?

YOUR STORY
BELONGS ON FIRE.

The Fireproof Podcast features attorneys, firm owners, and business owners who have been through it. The growth, the chaos, and the hard lessons nobody warns you about. If you've built something special, and learned lessons along the way, we want to hear your story.

Our audience is made up of law firm owners who are in the middle of it right now, and your experience could be exactly what they need.

READY TO
APPLY?

We're looking for law firm owners, operators, and industry leaders who are building firms worth talking about. If that's you — scan the code and tell us your story.

  • Active law firm owner or partner
  • Attorney with an inspiring story or lesson
  • A Fireproof client with a major success story
